message:
feat(fwc): add schedulable flag to rate forecast batch feasibility

Add schedulable: bool to BatchFeasibility and SchedulingSuggestion.
When pool limit is 0, mark batch as unschedulable with wait_for_reset
None and estimated_completion zero. Use saturating_add for overflow
safety. Update format helpers and add 6 tests for zero-limit scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
